name: Galisteo Blue Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the blue cornmeal and flour.
3. Add the eggs, baking powder, baking soda, crumbled Stilton Cheese, pine nuts, sugar, and salt to the dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
4. Pour in the buttermilk and stir until the batter is smooth.
5. Pour the batter into an 8-inch cake pan.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool for a few minutes before cutting and serving.
